audit_events.description: Account escalation workflow initiated. 5 signals: Regulatory hold, Overdue invoice, Delayed shipment, Escalated support, Usage decline detected. Recovery owners: Legal, Finance, Customer Success, Support.

customer_messages.body: We are writing to inform you that your account has been flagged for priority attention. Our teams have identified multiple areas requiring immediate resolution, including billing, logistics, and compliance matters. A dedicated recovery team spanning Legal, Finance, Customer Success, and Support has been activated and will reach out to coordinate next steps. We are committed to resolving these issues promptly and appreciate your continued partnership.
